text: @SamuraiSamFilms Yeah, it's a great film, there's no denying that. I have to tell you about "Gulliver's Travels" though. Miyazaki used the name Laputa from Swift's book, which was a place inhabited by idiot savantes who love Math, Music, and Astronomy but don't properly utilise them. You should read it; it's very politicially jabbing and entertaining. In a way, the Zelda characters are very Laputian, since their world lacks reason.
